Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_APPLIED_COUPON

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

SELECT distinct

full_payload_orderNo AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponCode AS COUPON_CODE_BK,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_promoDiscountGross AS COUPON_DISCOUNT_GROSS_AMOUNT,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_promoDiscountNet AS COUPON_DISCOUNT_NET_AMOUNT,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_promoDiscountDescr AS COUPON_DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_promoDiscountCode AS COUPON_DISCOUNT_CODE,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponType AS COUPON_TYPE,

full_payload_customer_customerNo AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

full_payload_orderTimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponParent AS COUPON_PARENT,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponName AS COUPON_NAME,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponNo AS COUPON_NUMBER,

country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponCode, FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_APPLIED_COUPON

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO, full_payload_salesPrice_appliedCoupons_couponCode

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, COUPON_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

 

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
COUPON_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
COUPON_DISCOUNT_GROSS_AMOUNT DECIMAL,
COUPON_DISCOUNT_NET_AMOUNT DECIMAL,
COUPON_DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION TEXT,
COUPON_DISCOUNT_CODE TEXT,
COUPON_TYPE TEXT,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
COUPON_PARENT TEXT,
COUPON_NAME TEXT,
COUPON_NUMBER INTEGER,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_A primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, COUPON_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON set comment = 'Details of the voucher entitling the holder to a discount off a particular product in an order. This is a transactional record of a discount that has been applied to an order. The discount could be for a Voucher distributed to a consumer, or related to a promotion. Promotions in DCE2.0 are generated by hybris and not always for a specific consumer: coupon codes are still available in CC packs, as well as generic promotions for ''black friday'' for example.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order assigned to the transaction.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_CODE_BK is
'Consumer order coupon code.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_DISCOUNT_GROSS_AMOUNT is
'Gross amount of the discount that is given when coupon is redeemed
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_DISCOUNT_NET_AMOUNT is
'Net amount of the discount that is given when coupon is redeemed
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_DISCOUNT_DESCRIPTION is
'Description of the discount given when coupon is redeemed
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_DISCOUNT_CODE is
'Code of the discount given when coupon is redeemed
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_TYPE is
'Defines the type/purpose of the coupon
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Consumer number.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Time of the order creation
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_PARENT is
'The number of the coupon that current coupon are related to
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_NAME is
'Name of the coupon applied to order
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.COUPON_NUMBER is
'Unique number for the coupon in the order
';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

CKC_VALID_FROM_TDE_HYBR

Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

CKC_VALID_TO_TDE_HYBR

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_APPLIED_COUPON

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31
